Online marketing for Bielefeld and the surrounding area

More growth. More customers.
For Bielefeld. Guaranteed.

✓ Local contact person
✓ Results in 90 days
✓ No long contract periods
YES, I WANT THAT!

Marketing is important...

...but they're already on your to-do list 101 things.

And they are all important!

So how do you optimize your marketing?

Do everything yourself?

No problem if you don't have much on the table.

But if you're already at capacity... that's not really an option.

Hire new employees?

Finding good people is not easy.

Training costs time and money.

And even if you find the perfect person, you are dependent on one person.

Hire an agency?

No five-figure marketing budget? Then your account may be managed by the assistant's intern.

Not exactly ideal.

"OK... And what makes you so different?"

Guaranteed

We only win if you win. This is the basis for a good partnership. You don’t bear all the risk — we share it.

Results

Our ultimate goal is measurable results for you. Talk less, deliver more.

Local

We are a local business — you can reach us when you need us.

Specialized

We work with industries we know - so we can deliver quickly, without long training.

Our services

And how do we want to do that?

Four services that intertwine – from the first click to the request.

01

Websites & web design

Clear structure, strong message, clear inquiry channels – websites that turn visitors into customers.

Copywriting & lead funnel

Texts that convince. Funnels that turn visitors into qualified leads – automatically.

Local SEO

Top 3 on Google in 90 days – guaranteed. Permanently visible, without a monthly advertising budget.

Google & Meta Ads

Immediate visibility on Google and Instagram – measurable, targeted and without wasted budget.

Find out more →

This is how it works

Very easy.

01

Strategy discussion

Book a free consultation so we can assess your market and current situation.

02

Onboarding

We'll guide you step by step through everything we need - transparently and easily.

03

Implementation

We work through every step of the process - so that your calendar isn't just full once, but permanently.

04

What works?

We track relevant data, see what really works - and do more of it.

FAQs

Frequently asked questions

How much does online marketing cost for you?

This depends on what services you need and how competitive your market is. In the first conversation we will look at your situation and make you a concrete offer - without any hidden costs.

How quickly do I see the first results?

This varies depending on the service: With Google & Meta ads, the first clicks and inquiries are often possible within a few days. With SEO it usually takes 60-90 days to see measurable results. Web design and copywriting take effect as soon as the new version is live.

Do you only work in Bielefeld?

No - we work with local businesses throughout OWL and beyond. We value local proximity, but a personal meeting is not a prerequisite for most services.

Do I have to sign a contract?

We work transparently and without restrictive contracts. We discuss the exact conditions individually – tailored to your needs and goals.

What makes you better than other agencies?

We are a small, specialized unit - not an anonymous large company. You work directly with us, not with a junior employee. And we only earn when you see results.

How do we start?

Simply fill out the contact form or write to us directly. We will contact you within 24 hours and arrange a free initial consultation.

For free

Book your free strategy call

If this is exactly what your company needs – let’s talk.
Book a quick call with us and we'll show you exactly how we would improve your marketing.
